content:
While reading the GPU TODO/notes, I noticed two items that look like good entry points:

  • Initial Devinit support - BIOS device initialization (memory sizing, waits, PLL configuration).

  • BAR PDE handling - synchronize page table handling for BARs between the kernel driver and GSP.

Are either of these being actively worked on right now? Since I am unfamiliar with this subsystem, so I don't understand the sea of mailing lists search results.
